tamarin_model.theory_code:
theory OnOffCluster_Matter_FSM
begin

/* 
 * On/Off Cluster (0x0006)
 * States: OffIdle, OnIdle, TimedOn, DelayedOff
 * Attributes tracked:
 *   - OnOff        : b_true / b_false
 *   - GlobalSceneControl : b_true / b_false
 *   - OnTime       : tv_zero / tv_pos / tv_ffff
 *   - OffWaitTime  : tv_zero / tv_pos / tv_ffff
 *   - timing_timer_active : tt_true / tt_false
 * Features (immutable per tid):
 *   - LT       : fv_true / fv_false
 *   - DF       : fv_true / fv_false
 *   - OFFONLY  : fv_true / fv_false
 *   - AcceptOnlyWhenOn (OnOffControl bit) : fv_true / fv_false
 */

//========================================
// SECTION 1: Function Declarations (SINGLE BLOCK)
//========================================
functions:
  // Boolean-like values
  b_true/0, b_false/0,

  // Feature boolean values
  fv_true/0, fv_false/0,

  // State enumerations
  st_OffIdle/0, st_OnIdle/0, st_TimedOn/0, st_DelayedOff/0,

  // Abstract timer values (for OnTime, OffWaitTime)
  // tv_zero: value 0
  // tv_pos : finite positive value (>0 and != 0xFFFF)
  // tv_ffff: sentinel 0xFFFF
  tv_zero/0, tv_pos/0, tv_ffff/0,

  // Timing timer active flag
  tt_true/0, tt_false/0

//========================================
// SECTION 2: Immutable Configuration
//========================================
// !Config(tid, LT, DF, OFFONLY, AcceptOnlyWhenOn)
 // LT, DF, OFFONLY, AcceptOnlyWhenOn ∈ {fv_true, fv_false}

// Generate all 2^4 combinations (LT, DF, OFFONLY, AcceptOnlyWhenOn).

rule Init_Features_LT0_DF0_OFF0_ACC0:
  [ Fr(~tid) ]
--[ ClusterInit(~tid) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, b_true, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_false, fv_false, fv_false, fv_false) ]

rule Init_Features_LT0_DF0_OFF0_ACC1:
  [ Fr(~tid) ]
--[ ClusterInit(~tid) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, b_true, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_false, fv_false, fv_false, fv_true) ]

rule Init_Features_LT0_DF0_OFF1_ACC0:
  [ Fr(~tid) ]
--[ ClusterInit(~tid) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, b_true, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_false, fv_false, fv_true, fv_false) ]

rule Init_Features_LT0_DF0_OFF1_ACC1:
  [ Fr(~tid) ]
--[ ClusterInit(~tid) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, b_true, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_false, fv_false, fv_true, fv_true) ]

rule Init_Features_LT0_DF1_OFF0_ACC0:
  [ Fr(~tid) ]
--[ ClusterInit(~tid) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, b_true, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_false, fv_true, fv_false, fv_false) ]

rule Init_Features_LT0_DF1_OFF0_ACC1:
  [ Fr(~tid) ]
--[ ClusterInit(~tid) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, b_true, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_false, fv_true, fv_false, fv_true) ]

rule Init_Features_LT0_DF1_OFF1_ACC0:
  [ Fr(~tid) ]
--[ ClusterInit(~tid) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, b_true, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_false, fv_true, fv_true, fv_false) ]

rule Init_Features_LT0_DF1_OFF1_ACC1:
  [ Fr(~tid) ]
--[ ClusterInit(~tid) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, b_true, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_false, fv_true, fv_true, fv_true) ]

rule Init_Features_LT1_DF0_OFF0_ACC0:
  [ Fr(~tid) ]
--[ ClusterInit(~tid) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, b_true, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, fv_false, fv_false, fv_false) ]

rule Init_Features_LT1_DF0_OFF0_ACC1:
  [ Fr(~tid) ]
--[ ClusterInit(~tid) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, b_true, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, fv_false, fv_false, fv_true) ]

rule Init_Features_LT1_DF0_OFF1_ACC0:
  [ Fr(~tid) ]
--[ ClusterInit(~tid) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, b_true, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, fv_false, fv_true, fv_false) ]

rule Init_Features_LT1_DF0_OFF1_ACC1:
  [ Fr(~tid) ]
--[ ClusterInit(~tid) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, b_true, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, fv_false, fv_true, fv_true) ]

rule Init_Features_LT1_DF1_OFF0_ACC0:
  [ Fr(~tid) ]
--[ ClusterInit(~tid) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, b_true, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, fv_true, fv_false, fv_false) ]

rule Init_Features_LT1_DF1_OFF0_ACC1:
  [ Fr(~tid) ]
--[ ClusterInit(~tid) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, b_true, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, fv_true, fv_false, fv_true) ]

rule Init_Features_LT1_DF1_OFF1_ACC0:
  [ Fr(~tid) ]
--[ ClusterInit(~tid) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, b_true, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, fv_true, fv_true, fv_false) ]

rule Init_Features_LT1_DF1_OFF1_ACC1:
  [ Fr(~tid) ]
--[ ClusterInit(~tid) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, b_true, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, fv_true, fv_true, fv_true) ]


//========================================
// SECTION 3: Off command (all features)
//========================================

// Off from OffIdle: no timer, OnOff already FALSE
rule Cmd_Off_From_OffIdle:
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, GSC, OT, OW, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'Off'), StateTransition(~tid, st_OffIdle, st_OffIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, GSC, tv_zero, OW, tt_false) ]

// Off from OnIdle: turn off, clear OnTime, timer inactive
rule Cmd_Off_From_OnIdle:
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, b_true, GSC, OT, OW, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'Off'), StateTransition(~tid, st_OnIdle, st_OffIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, GSC, tv_zero, OW, tt_false) ]

// Off from TimedOn: stop timer, clear OnTime, go OffIdle
rule Cmd_Off_From_TimedOn:
  [ St(~tid, st_TimedOn, b_true, GSC, OT, OW, tt_true),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'Off'), StateTransition(~tid, st_TimedOn, st_OffIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, GSC, tv_zero, OW, tt_false) ]

// Off from DelayedOff: stop timer, clear OffWaitTime, stay OffIdle
rule Cmd_Off_From_DelayedOff:
  [ St(~tid, st_DelayedOff, b_false, GSC, OT, OW, tt_true),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'Off'), StateTransition(~tid, st_DelayedOff, st_OffIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, GSC, OT, tv_zero, tt_false) ]


//========================================
// SECTION 4: On command, OFFONLY == FALSE (allowed)
//========================================

// OffIdle -> OnIdle (OFFONLY == FALSE)
rule Cmd_On_From_OffIdle_OffOnlyFalse:
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, GSC, OT, OW, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, fv_false, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'On'), StateTransition(~tid, st_OffIdle, st_OnIdle) ]->
  // if LT and both timers supported and OnTime == 0 then OffWaitTime := 0
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, b_true, GSC, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false) ]

// OnIdle -> OnIdle (OFFONLY == FALSE)
rule Cmd_On_From_OnIdle_OffOnlyFalse:
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, b_true, GSC, OT, OW, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, fv_false, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'On'), StateTransition(~tid, st_OnIdle, st_OnIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, b_true, GSC, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false) ]

// TimedOn -> OnIdle (OFFONLY == FALSE): cancel timing, clear timers
rule Cmd_On_From_TimedOn_OffOnlyFalse:
  [ St(~tid, st_TimedOn, b_true, GSC, OT, OW, tt_true),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, fv_false, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'On'), StateTransition(~tid, st_TimedOn, st_OnIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, b_true, GSC, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false) ]

// DelayedOff -> OnIdle (OFFONLY == FALSE): cancel timing, clear timers
rule Cmd_On_From_DelayedOff_OffOnlyFalse:
  [ St(~tid, st_DelayedOff, b_false, GSC, OT, OW, tt_true),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, fv_false, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'On'), StateTransition(~tid, st_DelayedOff, st_OnIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, b_true, GSC, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false) ]


//========================================
// SECTION 5: On command, OFFONLY == TRUE (unsupported)
//========================================

// OFFONLY == TRUE: Off and OnIdle: command rejected, state unchanged
rule Cmd_On_OffOnlyTrue_From_OffIdle:
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, fv_true, ACC) ]
--[ CommandRejected(~tid, 'On'), StateTransition(~tid, st_OffIdle, st_OffIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT) ]

rule Cmd_On_OffOnlyTrue_From_OnIdle:
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, fv_true, ACC) ]
--[ CommandRejected(~tid, 'On'), StateTransition(~tid, st_OnIdle, st_OnIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT) ]

rule Cmd_On_OffOnlyTrue_From_TimedOn:
  [ St(~tid, st_TimedOn, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, fv_true, ACC) ]
--[ CommandRejected(~tid, 'On'), StateTransition(~tid, st_TimedOn, st_TimedOn) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_TimedOn, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT) ]

rule Cmd_On_OffOnlyTrue_From_DelayedOff:
  [ St(~tid, st_DelayedOff, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, fv_true, ACC) ]
--[ CommandRejected(~tid, 'On'), StateTransition(~tid, st_DelayedOff, st_DelayedOff) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_DelayedOff, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT) ]


//========================================
// SECTION 6: Toggle command, OFFONLY == FALSE
//========================================

// OffIdle -> OnIdle
rule Cmd_Toggle_From_OffIdle_OffOnlyFalse:
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, GSC, OT, OW, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, fv_false, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'Toggle'), StateTransition(~tid, st_OffIdle, st_OnIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, b_true, GSC, tv_zero, OW, tt_false) ]

// OnIdle -> OffIdle
rule Cmd_Toggle_From_OnIdle_OffOnlyFalse:
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, b_true, GSC, OT, OW, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, fv_false, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'Toggle'), StateTransition(~tid, st_OnIdle, st_OffIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, GSC, OT, tv_zero, tt_false) ]

// TimedOn -> OffIdle (cancel timing)
rule Cmd_Toggle_From_TimedOn_OffOnlyFalse:
  [ St(~tid, st_TimedOn, b_true, GSC, OT, OW, tt_true),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, fv_false, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'Toggle'), StateTransition(~tid, st_TimedOn, st_OffIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, GSC, OT, tv_zero, tt_false) ]

// DelayedOff -> OnIdle (cancel timing)
rule Cmd_Toggle_From_DelayedOff_OffOnlyFalse:
  [ St(~tid, st_DelayedOff, b_false, GSC, OT, OW, tt_true),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, fv_false, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'Toggle'), StateTransition(~tid, st_DelayedOff, st_OnIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, b_true, GSC, tv_zero, OW, tt_false) ]


//========================================
// SECTION 7: Toggle command, OFFONLY == TRUE (unsupported)
//========================================

rule Cmd_Toggle_OffOnlyTrue_From_OffIdle:
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, fv_true, ACC) ]
--[ CommandRejected(~tid, 'Toggle'), StateTransition(~tid, st_OffIdle, st_OffIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT) ]

rule Cmd_Toggle_OffOnlyTrue_From_OnIdle:
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, fv_true, ACC) ]
--[ CommandRejected(~tid, 'Toggle'), StateTransition(~tid, st_OnIdle, st_OnIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT) ]

rule Cmd_Toggle_OffOnlyTrue_From_TimedOn:
  [ St(~tid, st_TimedOn, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, fv_true, ACC) ]
--[ CommandRejected(~tid, 'Toggle'), StateTransition(~tid, st_TimedOn, st_TimedOn) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_TimedOn, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT) ]

rule Cmd_Toggle_OffOnlyTrue_From_DelayedOff:
  [ St(~tid, st_DelayedOff, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, fv_true, ACC) ]
--[ CommandRejected(~tid, 'Toggle'), StateTransition(~tid, st_DelayedOff, st_DelayedOff) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_DelayedOff, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT) ]


//========================================
// SECTION 8: OffWithEffect (LT == TRUE only)
//========================================

// OnIdle -> OffIdle
rule Cmd_OffWithEffect_From_OnIdle_LTTrue:
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, b_true, GSC, OT, OW, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'OffWithEffect'), StateTransition(~tid, st_OnIdle, st_OffIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, b_false, tv_zero, OW, tt_false) ]

// TimedOn -> OffIdle (stop timing)
rule Cmd_OffWithEffect_From_TimedOn_LTTrue:
  [ St(~tid, st_TimedOn, b_true, GSC, OT, OW, tt_true),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'OffWithEffect'), StateTransition(~tid, st_TimedOn, st_OffIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, b_false, tv_zero, OW, tt_false) ]

// DelayedOff -> OffIdle (stop timing, clear OffWaitTime)
rule Cmd_OffWithEffect_From_DelayedOff_LTTrue:
  [ St(~tid, st_DelayedOff, b_false, GSC, OT, OW, tt_true),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'OffWithEffect'), StateTransition(~tid, st_DelayedOff, st_OffIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, b_false, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false) ]


// LT == FALSE: OffWithEffect unsupported (all states)
rule Cmd_OffWithEffect_LTFalse:
  [ St(~tid, S, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT),
    !Config(~tid, fv_false, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ CommandRejected(~tid, 'OffWithEffect'), StateTransition(~tid, S, S) ]->
  [ St(~tid, S, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT) ]


//========================================
// SECTION 9: OnWithRecallGlobalScene (LT == TRUE only)
//========================================

// OffIdle, GSC == FALSE -> OnIdle
rule Cmd_OnWithRecall_From_OffIdle_GSCFalse_LTTrue:
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, b_false, OT, OW, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'OnWithRecallGlobalScene'),
    StateTransition(~tid, st_OffIdle, st_OnIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, b_true, b_true, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false) ]

// OffIdle, GSC == TRUE -> OffIdle (discard)
rule Cmd_OnWithRecall_From_OffIdle_GSCTrue_LTTrue:
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, ON, b_true, OT, OW, TT),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ CommandDiscarded(~tid, 'OnWithRecallGlobalScene'),
    StateTransition(~tid, st_OffIdle, st_OffIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, ON, b_true, OT, OW, TT) ]

// OnIdle, GSC == FALSE -> OnIdle
rule Cmd_OnWithRecall_From_OnIdle_GSCFalse_LTTrue:
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, ON, b_false, OT, OW, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'OnWithRecallGlobalScene'),
    StateTransition(~tid, st_OnIdle, st_OnIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, b_true, b_true, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false) ]

// OnIdle, GSC == TRUE -> OnIdle (discard)
rule Cmd_OnWithRecall_From_OnIdle_GSCTrue_LTTrue:
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, ON, b_true, OT, OW, TT),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ CommandDiscarded(~tid, 'OnWithRecallGlobalScene'),
    StateTransition(~tid, st_OnIdle, st_OnIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, ON, b_true, OT, OW, TT) ]

// TimedOn, GSC == FALSE -> OnIdle, stop timing, clear timers
rule Cmd_OnWithRecall_From_TimedOn_GSCFalse_LTTrue:
  [ St(~tid, st_TimedOn, b_true, b_false, OT, OW, tt_true),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'OnWithRecallGlobalScene'),
    StateTransition(~tid, st_TimedOn, st_OnIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, b_true, b_true, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false) ]

// TimedOn, GSC == TRUE -> TimedOn (discard)
rule Cmd_OnWithRecall_From_TimedOn_GSCTrue_LTTrue:
  [ St(~tid, st_TimedOn, ON, b_true, OT, OW, TT),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ CommandDiscarded(~tid, 'OnWithRecallGlobalScene'),
    StateTransition(~tid, st_TimedOn, st_TimedOn) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_TimedOn, ON, b_true, OT, OW, TT) ]

// DelayedOff, GSC == FALSE -> OnIdle, stop timing, clear timers
rule Cmd_OnWithRecall_From_DelayedOff_GSCFalse_LTTrue:
  [ St(~tid, st_DelayedOff, b_false, b_false, OT, OW, tt_true),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'OnWithRecallGlobalScene'),
    StateTransition(~tid, st_DelayedOff, st_OnIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, b_true, b_true, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false) ]

// DelayedOff, GSC == TRUE -> DelayedOff (discard)
rule Cmd_OnWithRecall_From_DelayedOff_GSCTrue_LTTrue:
  [ St(~tid, st_DelayedOff, ON, b_true, OT, OW, TT),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ CommandDiscarded(~tid, 'OnWithRecallGlobalScene'),
    StateTransition(~tid, st_DelayedOff, st_DelayedOff) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_DelayedOff, ON, b_true, OT, OW, TT) ]


// LT == FALSE: OnWithRecallGlobalScene unsupported
rule Cmd_OnWithRecall_LTFalse:
  [ St(~tid, S, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT),
    !Config(~tid, fv_false, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ CommandRejected(~tid, 'OnWithRecallGlobalScene'),
    StateTransition(~tid, S, S) ]->
  [ St(~tid, S, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT) ]


//========================================
// SECTION 10: OnWithTimedOff (LT == TRUE only)
// OnTime and OffWaitTime fields are abstracted into tv_zero / tv_pos / tv_ffff
// AcceptOnlyWhenOn is the 4th config parameter.

//---- From OffIdle ----

// Case: AcceptOnlyWhenOn == 0, OffWaitTime <= 0 OR OffWaitTimeField == 0
// Abstract: current OW = tv_zero, field OWF = tv_zero -> TimedOn with OT >0
rule Cmd_OnWithTimedOff_From_OffIdle_To_TimedOn_Accept0_OWZero:
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, GSC, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, DF, OFFONLY, fv_false) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'OnWithTimedOff'), StateTransition(~tid, st_OffIdle, st_TimedOn) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_TimedOn, b_true, GSC, tv_pos, tv_zero, tt_true) ]

// Case: AcceptOnlyWhenOn == 0, OffWaitTimeField > 0, OffWaitTime > 0 -> DelayedOff
rule Cmd_OnWithTimedOff_From_OffIdle_To_DelayedOff_Accept0_OWPos:
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, GSC, OT, tv_pos, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, DF, OFFONLY, fv_false) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'OnWithTimedOff'), StateTransition(~tid, st_OffIdle, st_DelayedOff) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_DelayedOff, b_false, GSC, OT, tv_pos, tt_true) ]

// Case: AcceptOnlyWhenOn == 1 and OnOff == FALSE -> discard
rule Cmd_OnWithTimedOff_From_OffIdle_Discard_Accept1:
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, GSC, OT, OW, TT),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, DF, OFFONLY, fv_true) ]
--[ CommandDiscarded(~tid, 'OnWithTimedOff'),
    StateTransition(~tid, st_OffIdle, st_OffIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, GSC, OT, OW, TT) ]


//---- From OnIdle ----

// OnIdle, AcceptOnlyWhenOn == 0 or 1 with OnOff == TRUE, OnTimeField > current
// Abstract: result TimedOn with OT = tv_pos, OW set and timer active when OT>0
rule Cmd_OnWithTimedOff_From_OnIdle_To_TimedOn:
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, b_true, GSC, OT, OW, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'OnWithTimedOff'), StateTransition(~tid, st_OnIdle, st_TimedOn) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_TimedOn, b_true, GSC, tv_pos, tv_pos, tt_true) ]


//---- From TimedOn ----

// TimedOn, OnOff == TRUE, update OT ≥ existing, OW from field
rule Cmd_OnWithTimedOff_From_TimedOn_Stay_TimedOn:
  [ St(~tid, st_TimedOn, b_true, GSC, OT, OW, tt_true),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'OnWithTimedOff'),
    StateTransition(~tid, st_TimedOn, st_TimedOn) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_TimedOn, b_true, GSC, tv_pos, tv_pos, tt_true) ]


//---- From DelayedOff ----

// DelayedOff, OnOff == FALSE, update OW = min(current, field) > 0
rule Cmd_OnWithTimedOff_From_DelayedOff_Stay_DelayedOff:
  [ St(~tid, st_DelayedOff, b_false, GSC, OT, tv_pos, tt_true),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'OnWithTimedOff'),
    StateTransition(~tid, st_DelayedOff, st_DelayedOff) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_DelayedOff, b_false, GSC, OT, tv_pos, tt_true) ]


// LT == FALSE: OnWithTimedOff unsupported
rule Cmd_OnWithTimedOff_LTFalse:
  [ St(~tid, S, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT),
    !Config(~tid, fv_false, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ CommandRejected(~tid, 'OnWithTimedOff'),
    StateTransition(~tid, S, S) ]->
  [ St(~tid, S, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT) ]


//========================================
// SECTION 11: TimerTick_100ms
// We distinguish last vs intermediate tick by tv_pos vs tv_zero only.
// We do not model exact counters; instead we enforce:
//  - From TimedOn with tv_pos -> either stay TimedOn(tv_pos) or
//    non-deterministically go to OffIdle(tv_zero).
// This over-approximates but preserves progress possibility without
// illegal states.

// When timing_timer_active == FALSE: no-op, any state
rule TimerTick_NoEffect_OffIdle:
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, ON, GSC, OT, OW, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ TimerTick(~tid), StateTransition(~tid, st_OffIdle, st_OffIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, ON, GSC, OT, OW, tt_false) ]

rule TimerTick_NoEffect_OnIdle:
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, ON, GSC, OT, OW, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ TimerTick(~tid), StateTransition(~tid, st_OnIdle, st_OnIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, ON, GSC, OT, OW, tt_false) ]


// TimedOn, tt_true, OT = tv_pos: intermediate tick, stay TimedOn
rule TimerTick_From_TimedOn_Intermediate:
  [ St(~tid, st_TimedOn, b_true, GSC, tv_pos, OW, tt_true),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ TimerTick(~tid), StateTransition(~tid, st_TimedOn, st_TimedOn) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_TimedOn, b_true, GSC, tv_pos, OW, tt_true) ]

// TimedOn, tt_true, OT = tv_pos: last tick, go to OffIdle, clear OW, stop timer
rule TimerTick_From_TimedOn_Last:
  [ St(~tid, st_TimedOn, b_true, GSC, tv_pos, OW, tt_true),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ TimerTick(~tid), StateTransition(~tid, st_TimedOn, st_OffIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, GSC, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false) ]


// DelayedOff, tt_true, OW = tv_pos: intermediate tick, stay DelayedOff
rule TimerTick_From_DelayedOff_Intermediate:
  [ St(~tid, st_DelayedOff, b_false, GSC, OT, tv_pos, tt_true),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ TimerTick(~tid), StateTransition(~tid, st_DelayedOff, st_DelayedOff) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_DelayedOff, b_false, GSC, OT, tv_pos, tt_true) ]

// DelayedOff, tt_true, OW = tv_pos: last tick, go to OffIdle, OW->0, timer off
rule TimerTick_From_DelayedOff_Last:
  [ St(~tid, st_DelayedOff, b_false, GSC, OT, tv_pos, tt_true),
    !Config(~tid, LT, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ TimerTick(~tid), StateTransition(~tid, st_DelayedOff, st_OffIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, GSC, OT, tv_zero, tt_false) ]


//========================================
// SECTION 12: External LevelControl interactions (LT == TRUE only)
//========================================

// ExternalLevelControl_On from OffIdle
rule ExternalLevelControl_On_From_OffIdle_LTTrue:
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, GSC, OT, OW, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'ExternalLevelControl_On'),
    StateTransition(~tid, st_OffIdle, st_OnIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, b_true, b_true, tv_zero, tv_zero, tt_false) ]

// ExternalLevelControl_Off from OnIdle
rule ExternalLevelControl_Off_From_OnIdle_LTTrue:
  [ St(~tid, st_OnIdle, b_true, GSC, OT, OW, tt_false),
    !Config(~tid, fv_true, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ Command(~tid, 'ExternalLevelControl_Off'),
    StateTransition(~tid, st_OnIdle, st_OffIdle) ]->
  [ St(~tid, st_OffIdle, b_false, GSC, tv_zero, OW, tt_false) ]


// LT == FALSE: external level commands ignored (no effect)
rule ExternalLevelControl_On_LTFalse:
  [ St(~tid, S, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT),
    !Config(~tid, fv_false, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ CommandRejected(~tid, 'ExternalLevelControl_On'),
    StateTransition(~tid, S, S) ]->
  [ St(~tid, S, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT) ]

rule ExternalLevelControl_Off_LTFalse:
  [ St(~tid, S, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT),
    !Config(~tid, fv_false, DF, OFFONLY, ACC) ]
--[ CommandRejected(~tid, 'ExternalLevelControl_Off'),
    StateTransition(~tid, S, S) ]->
  [ St(~tid, S, ON, GSC, OT, OW, TT) ]


//========================================
// SECTION 13: Restrictions
//========================================

restriction unique_init:
  "All tid #i #j. ClusterInit(tid)@i & ClusterInit(tid)@j ==> #i = #j"


//========================================
// SECTION 14: Source Lemma (REQUIRED)
//========================================

lemma sources [sources]:
  "All tid s1 s2 #i. StateTransition(tid, s1, s2)@i
   ==> Ex #j. ClusterInit(tid)@j & #j < #i"


//========================================
// SECTION 15: Simple reachability lemmas
//========================================

lemma exec_on_exists:
  exists-trace
  "Ex tid #i. Command(tid, 'On')@i"

lemma exec_toggle_exists:
  exists-trace
  "Ex tid #i. Command(tid, 'Toggle')@i"

end
